commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the stale diagnostic context blocker and add focused tests; the broader API-boundary acceptance remains a maintainer decision before merge.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a new untrusted-to-plugin diagnostic data path; the normalizer is bounded, but stale per-session retention can expose or misattribute opaque upstream identifiers across runs.; Review finding: [P1] Cle... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an optional gateway `agent` `clientContext` request field, normalizes it, stores it in diagnostic session state, emits it on `message.queued` and `session.state`, and regenerates Swift protocol models.

PR surface: Source +182, Tests +209, Other +4. Total +395 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking patch bug: source inspection shows that a same-session context-bearing run followed by a no-context or invalid-context run leaves the old value in diagnostic session state. I did not run tests because this review was constrained to read-only inspection.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the stale diagnostic context blocker and add focused tests; the broader API-boundary acceptance remains a maintainer decision before merge.
